mapper.insert: INSERT INTO address ( member_id, zipcode, address, detail_address, created_at, default_yn ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{zipcode}, #{address}, #{detailAddress}, #{createdAt}, #{defaultYn} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, zipcode, address, detail_address AS detailAddress, default_yn AS defaultYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM address WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY default_yn DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, zipcode, address, detail_address AS detailAddress, default_yn AS defaultYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM address WHERE id = #{addressId}
mapper.update: UPDATE address SET default_yn = CASE WHEN id = #{addressId} THEN true ELSE false END WHERE member_id = #{memberId};
